ranked_movies.title: Pride and Prejudice
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently mentioned across multiple threads as a top-tier romance with tender, non-toxic relationships and excellent examples of male yearning. The 2005 adaptation was specifically highlighted.

ranked_movies.title: The Holiday
ranked_movies.reason: Consistently recommended for its cozy, heartwarming, and lighthearted romantic comedy elements. Described as a 'warm hug' and a perfect date night movie.

ranked_movies.title: While You Were Sleeping
ranked_movies.reason: Repeatedly suggested as a sweet, fluffy, and comforting romance movie with no tragic endings, fitting the request for a 'warm hug' of a film.

ranked_movies.title: Notting Hill
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended in multiple threads as a classic romance with great chemistry and a yearning male lead. Often listed among the best rom-coms.

ranked_movies.title: Serendipity
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently cited as a delightful, cozy romance film. Mentioned in the context of 'yearning' and as a top recommendation for a feel-good movie.

ranked_movies.title: Kate & Leopold
ranked_movies.reason: Highlighted multiple times for its romantic elements and specifically for Hugh Jackman's performance as a 'yearning' lead. Described as having great quotable lines.

ranked_movies.title: Amelie
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as a creative, quirky, and beautifully shot foreign romance film. Mentioned as a top choice for a date night and a unique love story.

ranked_movies.title: Stardust
ranked_movies.reason: Suggested as a fantastic mix of romance, comedy, and fantasy. Described as fitting cozy needs and being an underrated gem.

ranked_movies.title: 10 Things I Hate About You
ranked_movies.reason: A frequently mentioned classic rom-com that was listed in multiple threads as a top recommendation for both lighthearted and comedy romance.

ranked_movies.title: The Proposal
ranked_movies.reason: Consistently recommended across threads as a fun, lighthearted rom-com with great chemistry between Sandra Bullock and Ryan Reynolds.

ranked_movies.title: 13 Going on 30
ranked_movies.reason: Listed as a favorite rom-com by multiple users. Described as sweet, fluffy, and a perfect example of the genre.

ranked_movies.title: Leap Year
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended for its comforting, 'rainy day' warm hug vibe. Often paired with other cozy films like 'One Fine Day'.

ranked_movies.title: You've Got Mail
ranked_movies.reason: A classic Nora Ephron rom-com frequently suggested for its heartwarming story and excellent lead chemistry.

ranked_movies.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned as a top-tier modern rom-com that is both entertaining and a genuinely good movie, often recommended for date nights.

ranked_movies.title: North & South
ranked_movies.reason: Highly recommended in the 'yearning' thread, with Richard Armitage's performance cited as practically inventing the trope. A serious period piece with a great payoff.

ranked_movies.title: Ever After
ranked_movies.reason: A retelling of Cinderella frequently suggested as a sweet, uplifting romance with a strong heroine and a charming prince.

ranked_movies.title: About Time
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as a meaningful and profound romance with elements of comedy and time travel. Described as a great film for any occasion, though noted to be on the edge of the 'no cheating' request.

ranked_movies.title: The Princess Bride
ranked_movies.reason: A beloved classic frequently mentioned as a delightfully fun romance-adventure-comedy. Recommended for its wide appeal and quotable lines.

ranked_movies.title: My Big Fat Greek Wedding
ranked_movies.reason: Suggested as a hilarious and heartwarming rom-com with a non-toxic relationship where the man does the chasing. A crowd-pleaser.

ranked_movies.title: When Harry Met Sally
ranked_movies.reason: A cornerstone of the rom-com genre, frequently recommended for its exploration of friendship turning into love and its iconic scenes.
